styleGuide.visualDirection: Casual game UI style unified with existing start-menu icons: clean cartoon rendering, bold black outline, smooth flat+soft-shaded surfaces, clear ring hierarchy, high readability.
mustHave: all design content must stay inside one perfect outer circle
center area clean for icon overlay
clear inner and outer ring hierarchy
soft shadow and depth without clutter

assets.prompt: Create one game-style circular button base for Undo, matching referenced start-menu icons. Thick black outer outline, light stone outer ring, warm tan inner ring, soft cream center disk reserved for icon.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no symbol, no checkerboard, no mascot, no extra floating objects, no spikes, no black artifacts, no realistic metal texture
assets.safeAreaHint: Keep center 42% area smooth and less detailed for icon overlay.

assets.prompt: Create one game-style circular button base for Hint, matching referenced start-menu icons. Thick black outline, fresh green outer ring with subtle soft pattern, bright yellow-beige center medallion for icon placement.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no symbol, no checkerboard, no mascot, no noisy texture, no spikes, no gear teeth, no black artifacts, no realistic texture
assets.safeAreaHint: Center 42% area must stay clean for icon overlay.
assets.readabilityHint: Should feel friendlier and brighter than Undo and Shuffle.

assets.prompt: Create one game-style circular button base for Shuffle, matching referenced start-menu icons. Thick black outline, cyan-blue outer ring with subtle segmented motion feel, pale center medallion and SOLID closed center disk for icon overlay.
assets.negativePrompt: no text, no symbol, no checkerboard, no mascot, no clutter, no spikes, no black artifacts, no center hole, no missing center, no realistic texture
assets.safeAreaHint: Center 42% area must be a complete solid disk for icon overlay.
assets.readabilityHint: Looks dynamic but still clean at 74px.
